verses.1: A wise son listens to his father’s instruction,
verses.2: By the fruit of his lips, a man enjoys good things,
verses.3: He who guards his mouth guards his soul.
verses.4: The soul of the sluggard desires, and has nothing,
verses.6: Righteousness guards the way of integrity,
verses.7: There are some who pretend to be rich, yet have nothing.
verses.8: The ransom of a man’s life is his riches,
verses.9: The light of the righteous shines brightly,
verses.12: Hope deferred makes the heart sick,
verses.13: Whoever despises instruction will pay for it,
verses.14: The teaching of the wise is a spring of life,
verses.16: Every prudent man acts from knowledge,
verses.17: A wicked messenger falls into trouble,
verses.18: Poverty and shame come to him who refuses discipline,
verses.19: Longing fulfilled is sweet to the soul,
verses.20: One who walks with wise men grows wise,
verses.22: A good man leaves an inheritance to his children’s children,
verses.23: An abundance of food is in poor people’s fields,
verses.24: One who spares the rod hates his son,
verses.25: The righteous one eats to the satisfying of his soul,
